category_sources: Official README says RTP Tools is a set of small applications for processing RTP data.
source_facts.description says it processes RTP data.
display_name_sources: Official README heading is RTP Tools.
docs_sources: Official README says to refer to individual manpages for details and repository contains those manpage files.
repo_sources: source_facts.repo already contains https://github.com/irtlab/rtptools; per instruction repo is returned as null when source_facts.repo is present.
tags_sources: Official GitHub topics include streaming, real-time, protocol, rtp, rtcp, and rfc3550.
source_facts.description and executables identify RTP processing tools.
